title: First Session with a Personal Trainer
description: Book a fitness assessment and discuss your goals with a personal trainer at the gym.

transcript.speaker: trainer
transcript.text: Hi! Welcome to FitCore. I'm Jake, your personal trainer for today. Have you trained with a coach before?
transcript.translation: Salut ! Bienvenue chez FitCore. Je suis Jake, ton coach personnel pour aujourd'hui. Tu as déjà travaillé avec un coach ?

transcript.speaker: client
transcript.text: Not really. I go to the gym sometimes, but I never follow a proper programme.
transcript.translation: Pas vraiment. Je vais parfois à la salle, mais je ne suis jamais un programme précis.

transcript.speaker: trainer
transcript.text: That's totally fine — that's exactly why we're here. What are your main fitness goals?
transcript.translation: C'est tout à fait normal — c'est exactement pour ça qu'on est là. Quels sont tes principaux objectifs fitness ?

transcript.speaker: client
transcript.text: I want to lose a bit of weight and build some muscle. I also get out of breath quite quickly, so I'd like to improve my stamina.
transcript.translation: Je veux perdre un peu de poids et prendre un peu de muscle. Je manque aussi vite de souffle, donc j'aimerais améliorer mon endurance.

transcript.speaker: trainer
transcript.text: Great goals. How many days a week can you realistically commit to training?
transcript.translation: Excellents objectifs. Combien de jours par semaine peux-tu t'engager à t'entraîner de façon réaliste ?

transcript.speaker: client
transcript.text: Maybe three times a week. My schedule is quite busy, so I can't always guarantee more than that.
transcript.translation: Peut-être trois fois par semaine. Mon emploi du temps est assez chargé, donc je ne peux pas toujours garantir plus.

transcript.speaker: trainer
transcript.text: Three sessions is perfect to start. We'll combine cardio and strength training. Do you have any injuries or physical limitations I should know about?
transcript.translation: Trois séances c'est parfait pour commencer. On va combiner cardio et musculation. As-tu des blessures ou des limitations physiques que je dois connaître ?

transcript.speaker: client
transcript.text: I had a knee injury last year, but it's mostly healed. I just need to be careful with heavy squats.
transcript.translation: J'ai eu une blessure au genou l'année dernière, mais c'est presque guéri. Je dois juste faire attention aux squats lourds.

transcript.speaker: trainer
transcript.text: Noted. We'll avoid any high-impact exercises on the knee and modify the movements accordingly. Does that work for you?
transcript.translation: Noté. On va éviter tout exercice à fort impact sur le genou et adapter les mouvements en conséquence. Ça te convient ?

transcript.speaker: client
transcript.text: Yes, that sounds good. Should I bring anything specific to the sessions?
transcript.translation: Oui, ça me convient. Dois-je apporter quelque chose de particulier aux séances ?

transcript.speaker: trainer
transcript.text: Just comfortable trainers and a water bottle. A towel is also recommended — it gets sweaty in here!
transcript.translation: Juste des baskets confortables et une gourde. Une serviette est aussi recommandée — on transpire beaucoup ici !

transcript.speaker: client
transcript.text: Ha, good to know! How long does each session usually last?
transcript.translation: Ha, bon à savoir ! Combien de temps dure généralement chaque séance ?

transcript.speaker: trainer
transcript.text: About fifty to sixty minutes, including warm-up and cool-down. We'll track your progress every four weeks and adjust the programme if needed.
transcript.translation: Environ cinquante à soixante minutes, échauffement et retour au calme inclus. On suivra ta progression toutes les quatre semaines et on ajustera le programme si besoin.

vocabulary.definition: The ability to sustain physical or mental effort for a long time.
vocabulary.example_sentence: Running regularly helped her build stamina for the marathon.

vocabulary.definition: To dedicate yourself to something and follow through with it.
vocabulary.example_sentence: Can you commit to three training sessions a week?

vocabulary.definition: A restriction or weakness that prevents full performance.
vocabulary.example_sentence: His back injury was a limitation during heavy lifts.

vocabulary.definition: Exercises that put significant stress on the joints, like jumping.
vocabulary.example_sentence: Avoid high-impact activities if your knees are sore.

vocabulary.definition: Light exercises done before a workout to prepare the body.
vocabulary.example_sentence: Always do a five-minute warm-up before training.

vocabulary.definition: To regularly monitor and record improvement over time.
vocabulary.example_sentence: We track your progress every month to adjust the plan.
